site.title: Benjamin Nößler — Astro + AI integration developer · Vienna
site.description: Fast websites with AI integration. Based in Vienna, no agency overhead — Astro frontends and LLM plumbing for agencies and tech-savvy direct clients.

hero.headline: Fast websites with AI integration. From Vienna, no agency overhead.
hero.body: Astro frontends and LLM plumbing for agencies and direct clients who want to understand their website again.

services.label: What I do
services.intro: Three areas I'm building in right now. Clean frontends, AI integration with substance, and a modular self-hosted stack for SMBs that want to run their own tools.

sites.title: Astro sites
sites.description: Marketing sites and landing pages on Astro. Server output where needed, static where possible. No WordPress-plugin hell, no 200 KB of JS for a headline.

ai.title: AI integration
ai.description: Embeddings, retrieval, tool use, eval pipelines. Self-hosted or cloud — whichever fits the use case. Not hype-chasing, but finding the spots where an LLM actually changes something.

stack.title: Self-hosted stack
stack.description: Website, Invoice Ninja, booking, newsletter — on a single Coolify instance, EU region, EN16931-compliant. Run and cared for end-to-end by me — more for SMBs than for agencies.

fromEmployment.label: From employment
fromEmployment.intro: Selected projects from my permanent role — for context, not as a freelance portfolio.

process.label: How we'll work together
process.intro: Four steps, transparent prices, no sales theatre. On most projects I stay on as the point of contact after launch.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.body: 30 minutes, free. Understanding the problem and the scope — I'll be honest about whether I'm a fit.

steps.title: Fixed-price quote
steps.body: Clear scope, clear price. No hidden hours, no "available on request".

steps.title: Build with milestones
steps.body: Clean stages, regular previews, launch on schedule.

steps.title: Care plan or handover
steps.body: Hosting, updates, smaller changes from a single source — or you take over, your code. Most clients stay.

aboutPage.title: About me
aboutPage.description: Benjamin Nößler — background, work history and the technical part. Fullstack developer based in Vienna, day job on the City of Vienna's digital team, freelance for small businesses on the side.
aboutPage.lede: Day job on the City of Vienna's digital team, freelance for small businesses on the side — website, operation, and the digital tools around it.
bodyParagraphs: I help small Austrian businesses get visible online and stay that way: build or rebuild the website, then take over operation and care, plus the digital tools around it — booking, newsletter, invoicing.
I've been building web apps for years in employment and in my own projects (e.g. b-cal); on the freelance side I'm deliberately starting with a smaller scope and scope larger projects together.

I prefer projects meant to last longer than a quarter: cleanly built, self-hosted on infrastructure I manage end-to-end, with tools I'll still trust in two years. On most projects I stay on as the point of contact after launch.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Tell me about your project.
contact.body: Send me a few sentences about your project. I usually reply within 48 hours.

noscript.before: JavaScript is required for this form. You can email me directly at

form.messagePlaceholder: What's this about? A few sentences about the project, the current page, or your audience is perfect.
form.errorBody: Please try again or email me directly at benjamin@noessler.at.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageTooShort: Your message should be at least 20 characters.

footer.builtWith: Built with Astro · Hosted on Hetzner

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.description: Imprint as required under §5 of the Austrian E-Commerce Act and §25 of the Austrian Media Act.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Information on the processing of personal data on this website.

bundle.metaDescription: Website + Invoice Ninja from a single source, with modular add-ons for booking, analytics and newsletter. Your data, EU servers, EN16931-compliant, no SaaS lock-in.

hero.headline: Website + invoicing from a single source. Your data, EU servers, no SaaS lock-in.
hero.body: For Austrian SMBs that want to run their own tools — instead of wiring monthly fees to three different SaaS vendors. One setup, one monthly fee, one point of contact.

base.label: Base · what every client gets
base.title: Website + Invoice Ninja
base.description: A new website (Astro, fast, bilingual) plus a self-hosted billing stack with EN16931 hybrid PDF, EPC QR for SEPA payment, and the Austrian small-business VAT clause built in. Both run on European cloud infrastructure (Hetzner) I manage end-to-end.

setupItems.label: Invoice Ninja setup (EN16931 + EPC-QR + VAT clause + branding)

includedItems: Coolify hosting (shared CPX22, EU server) · SSL · daily backups
Updates and security patches for both apps
One support ticket per month, reply within one business day
Small text and image edits on the website included

addonsSection.label: Add-ons · subscribe any time
addonsSection.intro: Three modules I run on the same infrastructure. Each has a clear purpose and a clear price. Take only what you need.

addons.title: Online booking
addons.kicker: Direct booking instead of phone tag
addons.description: Appointments, consultations, intro calls, reservations. Clients book directly, your calendar stays in sync. Self-hosted, no third-party subscriptions.

addons.title: Privacy web analytics
addons.description: Self-hosted, GDPR-friendly in the default setup. You see what's happening on the site without personally identifying your visitors. No cookies, anonymized aggregates, no consent banner theatre.

addons.title: Newsletter sending
addons.description: Sending for seasonal campaigns and customer retention. Self-hosted, no €30-per-5k-subscribers gotcha.

proBundle.label: Pro bundle
proBundle.title: Booking + analytics + newsletter
proBundle.body: Take all three and the monthly drops from €25 to €20; setup from €230 to €200. Small, but real.

trust.label: In the wild
trust.intro: Two examples that show what the stack looks like in practice.

items.label: My own Invoice Ninja instance
items.body: I bill through the same setup I'm offering — EN16931 hybrid PDF, EPC QR, small-business VAT clause included.

items.label: Vordermann Flächenreinigung
items.body: Astro redesign with a booking workflow for a Vienna-based cleaning business. Direct inquiry channel instead of phone tag.

hourly.label: Extensions billed hourly
hourly.title: €60/hour
hourly.body: Bigger changes, new features, custom work — billed in 15-minute increments. Hourly rate for existing clients on an active care plan.

domain.label: Domain
domain.title: Your domain stays yours.
domain.body: You own the domain, I just manage it. If you don't have one yet, I'll handle the registration (€50 one-time, then around €12/year direct to the registrar).

fineprint.tax: All prices VAT-exempt, Austrian small-business rule §6 (1) Z 27 UStG. No VAT added.
fineprint.compliance: EN16931 + EPC-QR + small-business clause — ready for the Austrian B2B e-invoicing rule coming in 2028.

contact.title: Loom intro first, then a call.
contact.body: Send me a few sentences about your business — what you pay today, what you want to self-host, where it gets stuck. I usually reply within 48 hours.
